benefits.description: Skin improvement noticeable over 6+ months, described as icing on the cake with skincare routine, tretinoin, and estradiol management
Modest fat loss boost, roughly equivalent to 50 calorie deficit per day

side_effects.description: Water retention causing scale and blood pressure elevation
RAAS mediated hypertension managed with ACE inhibitor
May feel less rested when waking to alarm, requires 10-12 hour sleep cycles
Worsens insulin resistance or creates new metabolic disorder requiring management

protocol_notes: Using with TRT and estradiol management. Long-term use for skin benefits. Using ACE inhibitor for blood pressure mitigation. High E2 tolerance noted.
